violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed numerous food products in the cooler not date marked. Ex corndogs, hotdog, cheese
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed vent hood needs to be cleaned more frequently.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. In outdoor storage, observed single use items stored on the floor at time of inspection.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezers in dish room.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)

Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
